_meta.purpose: Static lookup of stamina index (0-100) for flat racing sires. 100 = elite Classic-distance / staying influence; 70-85 = strong middle-distance; 50 = neutral / unknown / versatile; 30-45 = miler-leaning; <30 = sprint-only.
_meta.anchors: Galileo=95 (gold standard staying sire), Frankel=85 (versatile but ~10f+ best), Sea The Stars=90 (Derby winner producing Derby winners), Camelot=88 (Derby winner, Classic stamina), Dubawi=78 (top sire, slight mile lean), Wootton Bassett=70 (top sire, mile/10f sweet spot), Kingman=40 (top miler sire, sprint/mile bias), No Nay Never=25 (juvenile/sprint).
_meta.rule: If sire not listed, return neutral 50 (anti-fabrication).
